title: unicode
text: unicode Enable or disable Unicode support in the SYB connector. Syntax USYS$SYB_PARAMS unicode Description When the unicode option is specified, Unicode characters can be used in fields with wide-character packing codes. By default, this is limited to characters in the Basic Multilingual Plane (BMP). Note: If you need to support the full Unicode range, you should also set the smp connector option. If the unicode option is not specified, Unicode support is disabled. In this case wide-character packing codes are mapped to C packing codes; for example, a W10 field is mapped to C40 (to accommodate the extra bits required for Unicode). Example: Enabling Unicode Support usys$syb_params charset utf8, unicode, smp, keyword Copy Related Links smp When Unicode support is enabled, allow the full range of Unicode characters to be stored in W packing code fields. Support for Unicode in the SYB Connector The Uniface SYB connector can support Unicode. By default, Unicode support is disabled. Unicode Unicode is an industry standard designed to allow text and symbols from all languages to be consistently represented and manipulated by computers. Wide Character Packing Code (W) The W (wide character) packing code is used for Unicode characters. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
